judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed the right approach but implemented the 2008 filter incorrectly by calling DuckDB’s strftime with wrong argument order and no casting (e.g., strftime('%Y', Date)), causing all AVG(Volume) queries to fail, after which it wrongly concluded—based on a single min/max date check for AGMH—that no qualifying companies had 2008 data.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Although the agent correctly identified the financially troubled NASDAQ-listed companies (query_db on stockinfo_database) and computed their 2008 average volumes (query_db on stocktrade_database producing var_call_RYdG5O0fpUXXjtqSF16V2FhR), it returned a narrative list including symbols and extra text instead of the exact "Company Name,Average" format required, causing the final return_answer to mismatch the ground-truth output.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
